results.name: editsum
results.title: EditSum
results.description: Temporarily intercepts all edit requests (including statement deletions) for items, properties and lexemes and prompts for edit summary, which will be appended to auto-generated one. Useful for providing an explanation for non-trivial edits.

results.name: eliasempresas
results.title: ELIAS EMPRESAS
results.description: Olá aqui é as Elias Empresas
results.subtitle: Elias Empresas

results.name: embeds
results.title: embeds.js
results.description:
This Wikidata script shows embeds on external ID statements such as YouTube videos, Spotify playlists, Twitter tweets, Genius lyrics, and more!
This helps you validate the accuracy of external identifiers, provides an interface to explore further document the data present in embeds, and makes editing fun!

results.name: enstrategywiki-stratw_-najzere-edit-counter
results.title: Edit counter
results.description: Adds a link to the toolbox to calculate your edits by namespace and write them to a table in your userspace.

results.name: entitree
results.title: Entitree
results.description: Navigable tree chart of any item from Wikidata.  Also, you can use any property as a relationship to build family trees, taxonomies, org charts and so on.

results.name: entityshape
results.title: EntityShape
results.description: Allows you to check whether an item conforms to a shex entitySchema (e.g. E10 for a human (Q5) and displays whether each property and statement in an entity conforms to that entityschema. Only works for relatively straightforward schemas at the moment.

results.name: entityusagepagetouchforalias
results.title: EntityUsagePageTouchForAlias
results.description: Touch pages that are using "O" aspects for aliases and change it to "A" as part of the migration phase.

results.name: enumitems
results.title: EnumItems
results.description: This script adds one or two tabs next to the watchlist star tabs, to jump to the previous or the next item, respectively. Works only in Vector skin.

results.name: enwiki-117avenue-remove-rollback
results.title: Remove Rollback
results.description: Disables the rollback feature.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-cfd-started
results.title: CfD Started
results.description: Adds a "CfDs Started" link to the top toolbar, primarily designed for [[Wikipedia:CfD|CfD]] regulars who wish to directly view category discussions opened today.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-drv-started
results.title: DRV Started
results.description: Adds a "DRVs Started" link to the top toolbar, primarily designed for [[Wikipedia:DRV|DRV]] regulars who wish to directly view deletion reviews opened today.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-editthispage
results.title: editthispage
results.description: Changes the "edit this page" label of the edit tab used in Monobook to show just "edit".

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-ffd-started
results.title: FfD Started
results.description: Adds an "FfDs Started" link to the top toolbar, primarily designed for [[Wikipedia:FfD|FfD]] regulars who wish to directly view file discussions opened today.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-myxfd
results.title: MyXfD
results.description: Adds a link to the toolbar for your XfD log.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-rfd-started
results.title: RfD Started
results.description: Adds an "RfDs Started" link to the top toolbar, primarily designed for [[Wikipedia:RfD|RfD]] regulars who wish to directly view redirect discussions opened today.

results.name: enwiki-1234qwer1234qwer4-tfd-started
results.title: TfD Started
results.description: Adds a "TfDs Started" link to the top toolbar, primarily designed for [[Wikipedia:TfD|TfD]] regulars who wish to directly view template discussions opened today.

results.name: enwiki-1250metersdeep-wikistats
results.title: WikiStats
results.description: Adds statistics links to the bottom of the page.

results.name: enwiki-203n7hn6-spellchecker
results.title: Spellchecker
results.description: Identifies common spelling mistakes in articles.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-aliaspam
results.title: AliasPam
results.description: [[WP:AutoEd|AutoEd]] module to alias a prompted parameter to another parameter.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-autowill
results.title: AutowIll
results.description: Automatically wikify interlanguage links (including external ones) and use {{tl|ill}} when possible

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-duplinks
results.title: Duplinks
results.description: Fork of duplinks-alt that adds an option to automatically highlight all duplicate links on load of any page in the namespaces Duplinks would have its portlet link appear in.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-movetop
results.title: MoveTop
results.description: Adds a topicon on [[Wikipedia:Protection policy#move|move-protected]] pages that changes depending on the move-protection level.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-seckedit
results.title: Seckedit
results.description: Modernized fork of alwaysEditSectionLink that fixes for [[mw:Heading HTML changes]] and optimizes for performance.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-temporapaint
results.title: TemporaPaint
results.description: Gives every [[WP:Temporary account]] a unique color for their links in changelists.

results.name: enwiki-aaron-liu-watchlyst-greybar-unsin
results.title: Watchlyst Greybar Unsin
results.description: Rewrite of Watchlist Notifier with modern APIs that won't display watchlist items marked as seen, has a dismiss button, and will display the rendered edit summary for any kind of watchlist item, including non-edits.

results.name: enwiki-afigureofblue-autoed
results.title: AutoEd
results.description: Cleanup various problems with markup, headlines, templates, and ISBNs.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-draft-sorter
results.title: Draft Sorter
results.description: Allows easy adding of WikiProject banners to drafts, using both manually entered subjects and subjects suggested by [[:mw:ORES]].

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-mass-move
results.title: Mass Move
results.description: Allows batch adding and removing prefixes and suffixes from page names.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-pageswap-gui
results.title: Pageswap GUI
results.description: Modified version with a form-based interface and additional features for easier usage in answering [[WP:RM|requested moves]].

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-picture-of-the-day-helper
results.title: Picture of the Day Helper
results.description: Assists with creation of Picture of the Day templates and notifications

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-redirectid
results.title: RedirectID
results.description: Modifies wikilinks to redirects to include the target name in the title attribute (which is visible when hovering over the link), e.g. WP:USL → Wikipedia:User scripts/List.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-refresh
results.title: refresh
results.description: Makes null edits on all pages in a category, all pages transcluding a template, or all pages linking to a target page.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-templatesearch
results.title: TemplateSearch
results.description: Allows using "TP:" and "{{((}}" as shortcuts for "Template:" in the search box.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-user-identifier
results.title: User identifier
results.description: Forked version of Anomie's script that supports more user rights, shows temporary account expiration, and has various other performance optimizations.

results.name: enwiki-ahecht-watchlistcleaner
results.title: WatchlistCleaner
results.description: Remove missing pages, redirects, pages you haven't edited recently, and/or pages you've never edited from your watchlist.

results.name: enwiki-ainz-ooal-gown-mobilemorelinks
results.title: MobileMoreLinks
results.description: A more updated version of Chouette. It has more links than it's parent script such as links to Copyvio detector, Page logs, etc.

results.name: enwiki-ais523-bracket-match
results.title: Bracket Match
results.description: Check matching for template and variable brackets.

results.name: enwiki-ais523-catwatch
results.title: Catwatch
results.description: Shows the addition of pages to specified categories on your watchlist.

results.name: enwiki-ais523-stub-tag-tab
results.title: Stub tag tab
results.description: Adds a link accessible in the drop-down menu in Vector and as a tab in Monobook that adds {{tl|stub}} tags per [[WP:Stub sorting]].

results.name: enwiki-ais523-top-contributions
results.title: Top Contributions
results.description: Color-codes lines according to who has the top contribution for a page.

results.name: enwiki-ais523-vote-symbols
results.title: Vote Symbols
results.description: Adds graphical icons to users' !votes in discussions.

results.name: enwiki-ais523-watchlist-notifier
results.title: Watchlist Notifier
results.description: Notification of changes to watched pages. Changes are checked on each page load, with notifications appearing at the top of the page under its title.

results.name: enwiki-alaexis-ai-source-verification
results.title: AI Source Verification
results.description: Helps editors verify whether a source supports a claim (no API key needed).

results.name: enwiki-ale-jrb-csdh-csd-helper
results.title: CSDH (CSD Helper)
results.description: Allows to easily handle speedy deletion requests, both deleting and declining, with multiple customizing options.

results.name: enwiki-ale-jrb-status-check
results.title: Status Check
results.description: Displays whether a user is on- or offline when viewing their user page, user talk page and contributions.

results.name: enwiki-alex-21-categoriessort
results.title: categoriessort
results.description: Sorts categories in an article alphabetically.

results.name: enwiki-alex-21-category-page-links
results.title: Category Page Links
results.description: Adds individual Talk, Edit and History links to every article listed in a category, similar to {{tl|pagelinks}}.

results.name: enwiki-alex-21-imageres
results.title: imageres
results.description: Provides statistics for files and their sizes.

results.name: enwiki-alex-21-redlinks
results.title: redlinks
results.description: Removes red links from an article.

results.name: enwiki-alex-smotrov-histcomb
results.title: HistComb
results.description: Combines consecutive edits by same editor into a single entry on history pages, replaces size with increment (like in watchlist/recent changes), shortens ''talk'', ''contribs'' and ''undo'' to single letter, highlights own edits with light green background, redirects link «Contributors» under heading to toolserver.

results.name: enwiki-alexander-davronov-historyhelper
results.title: HistoryHelper
results.description: The script adds three UI buttons and a list of checkboxes that wrap around and help to copy [[H:DIFF|diff link]]s on the [[Help:Page history]] and [[Help:User contributions]] pages into a formatted {{code|Special:Diff/}} or {{tlc|diff2|...}} or {{tag|table}} [[wp:wikitext|wikitext]]. The resulting wikitext may be used on the talk page to refer to changes. ([[:File:HistoryHelper-Revisions.png|Screenshot]]).

results.name: enwiki-alexis-jazz-factotum
results.title: Factotum
results.description: Insert a small reply form without leaving the page, create new (sub)sections, general wikitext editor.

results.name: enwiki-alexis-jazz-kill-it-with-fire
results.title: Kill-It-With-Fire
results.description: Activates on a user's contributions page. Allows for mass-undoing edits.

results.name: enwiki-alexis-jazz-luckyrename
results.title: LuckyRename
results.description: Streamlines requesting file moves and moving files.

results.name: enwiki-alextech01-snowflake
results.title: snowflake
results.description: Make snowflakes fall from your screen throughout Wikipedia!

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-crat-highlighter
results.title: Crat Highlighter
results.description: Highlights users, with caching and custom ordering and coloring of: bureaucrats, checkusers, oversighters, interface admins, arbitrators, and stewards (in addition to admins).

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-easyblock-modern
results.title: EasyBlock Modern
results.description: Same as the above, but tweaked to work properly with the Modern skin.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-history-button-links
results.title: History button links
results.description: Adds a button to filter the page's history to only show revisions of blocked users. Also works for the sysop revdel links.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-log-swap
results.title: Log swap
results.description: Provides a button on [[Special:Log]] to swap actions performed by a user with actions performed on that user.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-old-afd
results.title: Old AfD
results.description: Adds a line in the format {{small|{{red|Page created: 1 wks 0days 0hrs 0mins 1secs ago by Username.}}}} to the top of an AFD discussion.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-seven-tabs
results.title: Seven Tabs
results.description: Designed for compactness and the Modern skin, Seven Tabs shows edit and history tabs as above, but also includes an optional section 0 tab. Should work on Monobook as well.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-user-info
results.title: User Info
results.description: Tweaked version of the above, also displays on all user subpages as well as special pages like contributions or logs. Option to disable when viewing yourself.

results.name: enwiki-amorymeltzer-whatlinkshere-action-links
results.title: WhatLinksHere action links
results.description: Shows edit and history (and delete if user is a sysop) links on [[Special:WhatLinksHere]].

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-archiver
results.title: Archiver
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/Archiver|hat=no|inline=yes}} This is a fork of [[User:Σ|Σ]]'s and [[User:Enterprisey|Enterprisey]]'s archiver scripts, which are no longer maintained.

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-contribs-ranger
results.title: Contribs ranger
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/Contribs ranger|hat=no|inline=yes}}

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-copy-section-link
results.title: copy-section-link
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/copy-section-link|hat=no|inline=yes}}

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-not-around
results.title: Not around
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/Not around|hat=no|inline=yes}}

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-unsigned-helper
results.title: Unsigned helper
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/Unsigned helper|hat=no|inline=yes}}

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-user-tabs-on-contribs
results.title: user-tabs-on-contribs
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/user-tabs-on-contribs|hat=no|inline=yes}}

results.name: enwiki-andrybak-vectron
results.title: Vectron
results.description: {{Excerpt|User:Andrybak/Scripts/Vectron|hat=no|inline=yes|templates=-external media}}

results.name: enwiki-andy-m-wang-closerm
results.title: closeRM
results.description: Script to close nominations at [[WP:Requested moves]] (from the edit box).

results.name: enwiki-andy-m-wang-pageswap
results.title: pageswap
results.description: Allows administrators and [[Wikipedia:Page mover|page movers]] to [[WP:PM/C#4|swap the histories]] of two pages, also known as a ''history swap'' or ''round-robin move''.

results.name: enwiki-anerisys-contribution-shortcuts
results.title: contribution shortcuts
results.description: Adds "edit" and "info" shortcuts to each contribution on the user contributions page, as well as "source" to revisions in the page history. (all skins, Minerva in desktop mode only)

results.name: enwiki-animum-easyblock
results.title: EasyBlock
results.description: Adds a "block" tab to user pages, contribs pages, and diff pages. Comes with built-in block rationales and expiry times, as well as a "custom block" option.

results.name: enwiki-animum-massdelete
results.title: massdelete
results.description: Allows you to delete multiple pages at once by listing them at [[Special:MassDelete]].

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-admin-tagger
results.title: Admin Tagger
results.description: Fork of this script, but it uses emojis to denote the user groups. Multiple usergroups are displayed instead of just the 'highest rank' one.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-copyplaintext
results.title: CopyPlainText
results.description: Adds a "Copy plain text" link to the Tools menu to copy a clean, unformatted version of the current article.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-formatseealso
results.title: FormatSeeAlso
results.description: Formats "See also" sections per [[MOS:ALSO]] – annotates links, alphabetizes, and makes other improvements.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-gigawatch
results.title: Gigawatch
results.description: Fork of Megawatch. It now allows you to watch up to 500 articles in a category. Requires a modern web browser.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-pagedetails
results.title: PageDetails
results.description: Adds useful links to the side bar ([[User:Anne drew/PageDetails|list here]]).

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-setupautoarchive
results.title: SetupAutoArchive
results.description: Adds an option to the '''More''' drop-down that enables automated archival for talk pages.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-tidytools
results.title: TidyTools
results.description: Automatically sorts the Tools menu alphabetically.

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-veracity
results.title: Veracity
results.description: Generates [[WP:SPOTCHECK|source spot check]] tables for FA/GA reviews

results.name: enwiki-anne-drew-watching-indicator
results.title: Watching Indicator
results.description: Adds an indication to your signature of whether you are watching the page.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-diffcur
results.title: diffcur
results.description: Adds a "Cur →" link next to the "Next edit →" link in diffs.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-file-toggle-transparency
results.title: file-toggle-transparency
results.description: Changes the transparent color fill on file description pages.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-link-classifier
results.title: Link Classifier
results.description: Colors links on the page to indicate redirects, broken redirects, disambiguation pages, and XfDs ''by default''.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-nosubmitsummary
results.title: NoSubmitSummary
results.description: Prevent the form from being submitted when hitting enter in the edit summary box.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-preview-template-last-modified
results.title: Preview: Template Last Modified
results.description: When previewing changes, sorts list of called templates by date last modified and displays the latest edit summary for each; useful for debugging complex templates.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-talklink
results.title: talklink
results.description: Colorizes the "talk" tab link to indicate when it is empty or a redirect.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-unsigned-helper
results.title: Unsigned helper
results.description: Adds {{tl|unsigned}} to the Edit tools box to assist in signing unsigned comments.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-untoclimit
results.title: untoclimit
results.description: Undoes the effects of {{tl|TOC limit}}.

results.name: enwiki-anomie-user-identifier
results.title: User identifier
results.description: Marks, using graphical icons, users with user rights in all listings and signatures.

results.name: enwiki-aoppo-globstory-openhistoricalmap-wikipedia-integration
results.title: Globstory - (OpenHistoricalMap -Wikipedia Integration)
results.description: Lets you view OpenHistoricalMap alongside the Wikipedia article. Hovering your mouse over a year or a geographic location will update the map accordingly.

results.name: enwiki-aquilafasciata-gototopfast
results.title: goToTopFast
results.description: Modified version to speed up the animation.

results.name: enwiki-aram-diff-restorer
results.title: diff restorer
results.description: Adds restore buttons next to deleted lines in diff views, allowing you to quickly restore removed content while editing.

results.name: enwiki-aram-patrol-link-highlighter
results.title: Patrol Link Highlighter
results.description: Highlights the "{{int:Markaspatrolledtext}}" link and blinks it animatedly every seconds.

results.name: enwiki-armbrust-closemrv
results.title: closemrv
results.description: Script to close nominations at [[WP:Move review]] (from the edit box).

results.name: enwiki-arthurfragoso-resizingdragbar
results.title: ResizingDragBar
results.description: Adds a draggable resizing bar to the bottom of the edit box.

results.name: enwiki-arthurfragoso-sidebysideedit
results.title: SideBySideEdit
results.description: Enables a side-by-side edit-preview experience.
